meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Samsung Phone repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Samsung Phone Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Expert Samsung Galaxy repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, battery, charging port, water damage repair for all Galaxy S, Z Fold, Z Flip, A series & Note models. Fast same-day service.
page.h1: Winnipeg's Samsung Galaxy Phone Repair Specialists
page.heroDescription: From the latest Galaxy S24 Ultra to foldable Z Fold and Z Flip devices, we specialize in Samsung smartphone repairs. Cracked screens, dead batteries, water damage, and charging issues—all fixed with quality parts and backed by our repair warranty.

heroImage.alt: Samsung Galaxy phone repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Galaxy S, A, and Note AMOLED screen replacements. Z Fold and Z Flip inner and outer display repairs with quality parts. Samsung screen repair costs vary significantly by model and part availability. For many Samsung phones — especially newer or higher-end models — the replacement screen used is the original Samsung display, which can impact overall repair cost. Lower-quality aftermarket screens may exist for some models, but they are not offered when they cannot be reliably warrantied.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Samsung phone batteries degrade after 2-3 years. Restore full-day battery life with same-day replacement service.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: USB-C charging port repair for all Galaxy phones. Includes cleaning, testing, and component replacement if needed.

services.name: Water Damage Repair
services.description: Dropped your Galaxy in water? Our ultrasonic cleaning and component-level repair gives your phone the best chance of recovery.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Rear camera module and front selfie camera repairs. Fix blurry photos, cracked lenses, and autofocus issues.

services.name: Speaker & Mic Repair
services.description: Can't hear calls or be heard? Speaker, earpiece, and microphone repairs for all Samsung Galaxy phones.

advantage_pillars.title: Foldable Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Z Fold and Z Flip repairs including screen, hinge, and flex cable issues. Few shops in Winnipeg touch foldables—we embrace them.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Galaxy Repairs
advantage_pillars.description: Most Samsung phone repairs completed same day. Walk-ins welcome at both locations. Same-day Samsung phone repair depends on the model, part availability, and our current repair queue.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs. Warranty coverage applies to the part replaced only and does not extend to unrelated components. If a function cannot be tested prior to repair, its operation cannot be guaranteed afterward.

advantage_pillars.title: Transparent Pricing
advantage_pillars.description: Free diagnostics and upfront quotes. No surprises—know your repair cost before we start.

model_categories.title: Galaxy S Series
model_categories.description: Samsung's flagship phones. AMOLED screen replacements and battery service for all S series generations.

model_categories.title: Galaxy Z Fold & Z Flip
model_categories.description: Foldable phone specialists. Inner screen, outer screen, hinge mechanism, and flex cable repairs.

model_categories.title: Galaxy A Series
model_categories.description: Budget-friendly repairs for Samsung's mid-range lineup. Same quality service, lower cost parts.

model_categories.title: Galaxy Note Series
model_categories.description: S Pen and stylus functionality preserved. Screen and battery repairs for all Note models. For certain Samsung models, we'll also help you decide whether repair or replacement makes more financial sense.

models_description: We repair all Samsung Galaxy phone models including the S series, Z Fold, Z Flip, A series, and Note series. Don't see your model? Contact us!

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Samsung repair costs are primarily driven by the screen—OEM Samsung displays can be surprisingly expensive, especially for flagship S and Z series devices. Samsung provides official guidance on device care and battery maintenance that can help extend the lifespan of your Galaxy phone.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers expect Samsung repairs to cost less than iPhone repairs, but premium AMOLED screens often cost the same or more. As iFixit's Samsung teardowns demonstrate, foldable devices like the Z Fold and Z Flip have particularly complex internal assemblies that affect repair difficulty and cost.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches the value of your device, we'll explain that clearly so you can make an informed decision.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still an option.

faqs.question: How long does Samsung phone screen replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most Samsung Galaxy screen replacements are completed within 1-2 hours. Foldable devices like the Z Fold and Z Flip may take 2-4 hours due to their complex display assemblies.

faqs.question: Do you repair Samsung Galaxy foldable phones?
faqs.answer: Yes! We specialize in Galaxy Z Fold and Z Flip repairs including inner screen, outer screen, hinge mechanism, and flex cable issues. Few repair shops in Winnipeg work on foldables—we have the tools and experience.

faqs.question: How much does Samsung Galaxy repair cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Repair costs vary by model. Galaxy A series repairs are typically the most affordable, while flagship S series and foldable Z series cost more due to premium components. Use our free quote tool for an accurate estimate. Learn more about how repair pricing works.

faqs.question: Do you use genuine Samsung parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality parts that meet or exceed OEM specifications. We'll discuss part options and pricing with you before starting any repair.

faqs.question: Will I lose my data during Samsung phone repair?
faqs.answer: For most repairs (screen, battery, charging port), your data remains intact. We recommend backing up before any repair as a precaution. For water damage cases, data recovery is a priority.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for Samsung repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
